ham.subject: Transaction Alert: Rs. 5000 debited from your account
ham.body:
Dear Mr Sharma,

We would like to inform you that a transaction of Rs. 5000 has been debited from your savings account ending in 1234 on 15/04/2026 at 02:30 AM.

If you did not authorize this transaction, please contact our support immediately at <URL>.

Thank you for banking with SBI.

Regards,
SBI Customer Support

spam.subject: Urgent: Payroll Update for 2026
spam.body:
Dear Employee,

This is to inform you that your payroll for the month of April 2026 has been processed. A direct deposit of Rs. 45000 has been credited to your account ending in 5678 on 20/04/2026.

Please verify your bank details by logging into the employee portal at <URL> within 24 hours.

Failure to do so may result in delay of your salary.

Best Regards,
HR Department, XYZ Ltd.
